# Book Scan Intake Checklist

Copy this checklist into the project docs for a new scan set and fill it before
running the full PDF pipeline.

## Source Folder

- Raw scan path:
- Scan date:
- Scanner/software:
- File extensions:
- File count:
- Filename ordering verified:
- Supplemental material present:
- Supplemental material path:

## Image Shape

- Main dimensions:
- Alternate dimensions:
- DPI:
- Cover pages:
- Interior pages:
- Orientation:
- Platen/artifact side pattern:
- Blank pages or inserts:
- Foldouts or oversized pages:

## Color Policy

- Real color pages:
- Grayscale pages:
- RGB files with identical channels:
- RGB files with non-identical channels:
- Distribution color policy:
- Archival color policy:

## Processing Decisions

- Target canvas:
- Crop detector strategy:
- Pages requiring manual review:
- Contact-sheet output:
- Image-only PDF outputs:
- Distribution PDF output:
- Archival PDF output:

## OCR Decisions

- OCR language:
- Distribution OCRmyPDF settings:
- Archival OCRmyPDF settings:
- Metadata title:
- Metadata author:
- Metadata subject:
- Metadata keywords:
- OCR warnings to review:

## Validation Evidence

- Intake report path:
- Processing manifest path:
- Page count check:
- Metadata check:
- OCR text sample pages:
- Rendered sample pages:
- `pdfimages` color/component check:
- Distribution size:
- Archival size:
- Open issues:
